name: My Picture Pack
author: Your Name
description: A custom picture pack for 7 Days to Die V2.6
_comment_pickup: true (default) inlines blocks.xml patches that add CanPickup=true to ~83 vanilla picture/poster/canvas/frame blocks. Press E in-game to pick up. Set false to skip.
_comment_extended_decor: true (default) extends press-E pickup to ~224 more wall decor blocks: flags, road signs, OPEN/CLOSED, gun store + shop signs (unlit), bathroom signs, wall clocks, mirrors, bulletin boards, planters, ad signs, gas signs. Trader signage and lit/electrical signs are deliberately excluded.
_comment_slots: Each slot key is a stable identifier (see SLOTS list in make_pack.py).
Drop the matching image in ./images/ and reference its filename here.
Skip any slot you don't want to override ~ vanilla stays vanilla.
wood_dark | wood_light | gold_gilt | silver | matte_black | ornate_gold
Slot kinds (just FYI, the script picks automatically):
portrait     1x1 backer painting, frame style applies
decor        Calendar / blueprint / target / snack poster, no frame
moviePoster  Tile of shared posterMovie atlas (theater variants ride along)
canvasTile   Tile of a shared canvas/picture-frame atlas. Picture frames
use the `frame` field as a wood-tint that's shared across
sibling letters in the same atlas (first filled wins).
